tension: Enduring-target breadth vs active-slice proof depth
reading: The broader WoS platform remains canonical system truth, but the most concretely proven live slice is still God of Carnage plus its supporting runtime path.

tension: Committed player path vs live-room / projection surfaces
reading: Multiple session-facing surfaces exist and are now explicitly governed, but a fresh fully replayed convergence proof is still missing in this container.
The overlap is now explicitly governed, but it remains a place where future refactors could reintroduce silent truth-boundary drift.
Later packages narrowed the residue, but it is still not honest to call the seam fully retired.
AI-stack graph and fallback expectations remain canonically important, yet full replay still depends on missing optional dependencies.

tension: Governed lifecycle and operator surfaces vs fresh replay completeness
reading: Package lifecycle, rollback, runtime health, settings, budgets, and control-plane visibility are now canonically preserved, but not all have been freshly exercised end to end in this pass.

tension: Collection-run inherited-proof framing vs final-pass fresh judgment
reading: The collection-only package treated runtime-proof as inherited context; this final pass performs its own bounded runtime-proof judgment instead of inheriting one blindly.
